queries.question: What is the platform name common for all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Platform.name  from Streaming_Service_Platform join Platform on Streaming_Service_Platform.platform_id = Platform.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Platform.streaming_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Platform.platform_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Platform.streaming_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: For each streaming service, what is the name of the corresponding platform?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.service_name , platform.name from Streaming_Service_Platform join Platform on Streaming_Service_Platform.platform_id = Platform.id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Platform.streaming_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?service_name ?name WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_platform a :Streaming_Service_Platform .
  ?platform a :Platforms .
  ?streaming_service_platform p:hasPlatform ?platform .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_platform p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:service_name ?service_name .
  ?platform p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the name of the platform for every streaming service.
